treePosition: Practiced first, per the workbook's explicit instruction to start with Amen before moving down the Tree.
teachingNotes: AMEN is the foundation of all other faculties as it is the inexhaustible reservoir of INNER PEACE that nourishes our Vitality, Health, and activates the Divine Faculties of Oneness, Wisdom, and Spiritual Power.

Start your meditation practice with the AMEN faculty, moving down the Tree in order, ending with Geb. Where you have a spiritual reading or some other directive to work urgently on one of the other faculties, it is best to combine your meditation with AMEN and the other faculty, unless your previous spiritual work has already established this foundation.

Ideally, you will work on one to two faculties per month in 21 days of meditation and 7 days of review and preparation for the next cycle. At this pace, you will complete your first journey through the Tree in six to twelve months.

hekau.text: I am a divine spiritual being endowed with the ability to respond to all challenges in a peaceful way to guarantee the wellbeing of everyone. Peace protects my health, uplifts my intelligence, and guarantees me a successful destiny.
You could have made us incapable of being at peace in the midst of challenges, like dogs, and pigs. I thank you God, for making us in your likeness.
Thank you for the peace that you placed in the core of my being. It blesses me with the ability to live truth on the inside, as I live it on the outside. Emblem of sincerity.

Since it has been medically proven for thousands of years that indulging anger, fear, worry, grief, and sadness damages well-being, lowers IQ, life performances, and social harmony, I endure in my efforts to always respond with peace to all challenges. I am a divine spiritual being.

Although many people cannot intuit the truth that the universe was created by an all-knowing, and powerful being, and seeing that the world has been designed with interest in the well-being of all, I place my trust in this being God, the Supreme Being, for my wellness in life. I know that it will come to pass because of living the Laws of God. I am therefore eternally at peace in all situations.
It is with smiles, and laughter that I enter the kingdom of doom, and disaster. Peace is my nature. What good is there in losing it?
You saved me from the tyranny of suffering before I was born. You made me peaceful by nature.
I take neither gain, or loss to heart. Peace is my nature.
I give thanks for the wrongdoer that has crossed my path to give me a genuine opportunity to nourish my divine nature that I may realize my divinity.
